entity.label: Taberah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Burning, a place in the wilderness of Paran, where the “fire of the Lord” consumed the murmuring Israelites (Num. 11:3; Deut. 9:22). It was also called Kibroth-hattaavah (q.v.).

nodes.label: Taberah
nodes.description: Burning, a place in the wilderness of Paran, where the “fire of the Lord” consumed the murmuring Israelites (Num. 11:3; Deut. 9:22). It was also called Kibroth-hattaavah (q.v.).

verses.text: And he called the name of the place Taberah: because the fire of the LORD burnt among them.
And at Taberah, and at Massah, and at Kibrothhattaavah, ye provoked the LORD to wrath.
